#
# Rule: payment_card_pin
# Category: financial
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Same-length mask for the PIN value. Length-preserving output leaks PIN
# width; callers concerned about that should register full_redact under
# a custom rule name. Example: 1234 → ****.

1234	****
